final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original children's picture-book illustration of a forest concert scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 儿童绘本 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include small animals performing in the foreground, 蘑菇屋 and 彩虹 in the background
Subject: must include:
  - a rabbit playing 大提琴
  - a squirrel playing 笛子
  - a forest concert setting with other cute small animals as audience / performers
Scene/backdrop: must include a fairytale forest with 蘑菇屋 and a 彩虹
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, whimsical 童话 atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, bright, 童趣 direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a soft illustrated picture-book surface treatment — exact texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
